session.user: Run `make fast-ci` and report the results. Do NOT fix any errors — just report what passes and fails.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.param: Run fast-ci make target for validation checks

session.assistant:
## make fast-ci Results
**FAILED**: Exit code 2
### Summary
The fast-ci make target partially succeeded but failed at the **Prettier Check** stage:
| Check | Status | Details | |-------|--------|---------| | Lint | PASSED | All checks passed | | Format Check | PASSED | 1638 files already formatted | | **Prettier Check** | **FAILED** | Code style issues found in 8 files | | Markdown Check | PASSED | OK | | Exec Reference Check | PASSED | reference.md is up to date | | ty | PASSED | All checks passed | | Unit Tests (erk) | PASSED | 5647 passed in 22.36s | | Unit Tests (erk-dev) | PASSED | 136 passed in 4.38s | | Unit Tests (erk-statusline) | PASSED | 115 passed in 0.85s | | Unit Tests (erk-mcp) | PASSED | 24 tests (output cut off) |
### Issues Found
**Prettier formatting violations in 8 files:** - `.claude/skills/erk-skill-onboarding/SKILL.md` - `docs/learned/architecture/git-graphite-quirks.md` - `docs/learned/architecture/rebase-conflict-patterns.md` - `docs/learned/capabilities/bundled-skills.md` - `docs/learned/commands/optimization-patterns.md` - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/pr-operations/pr-submit-phases.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
The make target failed due to the Prettier formatting issues before all test results were displayed.
